name: MiniMax Speech 2.8 HD
description: MiniMax Speech 2.8 HD focuses on studio-grade audio generation with emotion control, multilingual support (40+ languages), and voice cloning.

input.text: Hello! Welcome to Cloudflare AI Gateway. Let me show you what we can do.

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl
code_snippets.code:
curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/ai/run \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "model": "minimax/speech-2.8-hd",
  "input": {
    "format": "mp3",
    "pitch": 0,
    "speed": 1,
    "text": "Hello! Welcome to Cloudflare AI Gateway. Let me show you what we can do.",
    "voice_id": "English_expressive_narrator",
    "volume": 1
  }
}'

examples.name: Custom Voice
examples.description: Use a specific voice and adjust speed

input.text: The weather today is sunny with a high of 72 degrees. Perfect for a walk in the park.

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl
code_snippets.code:
curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/ai/run \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "model": "minimax/speech-2.8-hd",
  "input": {
    "format": "mp3",
    "pitch": 0,
    "speed": 0.9,
    "text": "The weather today is sunny with a high of 72 degrees. Perfect for a walk in the park.",
    "voice_id": "English_expressive_narrator",
    "volume": 1
  }
}'

input.text: Congratulations! You've just won the grand prize! This is absolutely incredible news!

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl
code_snippets.code:
curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/ai/run \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "model": "minimax/speech-2.8-hd",
  "input": {
    "emotion": "happy",
    "format": "mp3",
    "pitch": 0,
    "speed": 1,
    "text": "Congratulations! You'\''ve just won the grand prize! This is absolutely incredible news!",
    "voice_id": "English_expressive_narrator",
    "volume": 1
  }
}'

input.text: This recording is generated at studio quality sample rate for the highest possible audio fidelity.

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl
code_snippets.code:
curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/ai/run \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "model": "minimax/speech-2.8-hd",
  "input": {
    "format": "mp3",
    "pitch": 0,
    "sample_rate": 44100,
    "speed": 1,
    "text": "This recording is generated at studio quality sample rate for the highest possible audio fidelity.",
    "voice_id": "English_expressive_narrator",
    "volume": 1
  }
}'

text.description: The text to convert to speech. Maximum 10,000 characters.

voice_id.description: The voice ID to use for synthesis

audio.description: URL to the generated audio file
